contents.title: What's YuanSa FAQ?
contents.content: YuanSa FAQ is a FAQ online editor that supports multi languages and classification. By using JSON format to save your work, you can easily customize it's display styles.

contents.title: 什么是元卅FAQ？
contents.content: 元卅FAQ是一款支持多语言、分类的在线FAQ编辑器。借助纯净的 JSON 格式存储，使你你可以轻松实现样式定制化。
